title: Resurrection
author: john-french
description: Inquisitor Covenant hunts a dangerous heretical movement known as the Horusian Wars, whose followers seek to resurrect the power of Horus himself to fight Chaos — a goal that makes them as dangerous as any enemy of the Imperium.

title: Incarnation
author: john-french
description: Covenant's pursuit of the Horusian heresy leads him deeper into a conspiracy that spans multiple factions of the Inquisition itself, as the possibility of recreating Horus's power draws ever closer to terrifying reality.
